creator: sean@stat.duk.edu
text:
I propose changing the master site for ctwm from the
        ftp://slhp1.epfl.ch/pub/ to http://http://ctwm.dl.nu/
        since the bandwidth is higher and there is a 3.5.2 
        tarball already there

Fix: I propose the following patches:



It would also be nice to plug the website for ctwm:

http://http://ctwm.dl.nu/--7MvV3FPyZSMqv3UNayfwGSqo1KMnF3jVP4VVU1WJeoggNK6i
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- Makefile.orig       Sat Jan 29 14:54:36 2000
+++ Makefile    Sat Jan 29 15:00:37 2000
@@ -9,11 +9,7 @@
 DISTNAME=      ctwm-3.5.2
 PKGNAME=       ctwm-3.5.2
 CATEGORIES=    x11-wm
-MASTER_SITES=  ftp://slhp1.epfl.ch/pub/
-
-#PATCH_SITES=  ${MASTER_SITES}
-#PATCHFILES=   ctwm-3.5-3.5.1.diffs.gz ctwm-3.5.1-3.5.2.diffs.gz
-#PATCH_DIST_STRIP=     -p1
+MASTER_SITES=  http://http://ctwm.dl.nu/
 
 MAINTAINER=    torstenb@FreeBSD.org
How-To-Repeat: 
	N/A
